---
title: "Assignments"
toc: true
---

## Problem Sets (30%)

Problem sets are hands-on exercises in R. You may use generative AI to help troubleshoot code, but should not use it to write your programs from scratch.

| Assignment | Topic | Materials |
|------------|-------|-----------|
| Problem Set 1 | Intro to R | [Prompt](Problem_Sets/Problem_Set_01/ProblemSet1_PADM.qmd) |
| Problem Set 2 | Data wrangling & visualization | [Prompt](Problem_Sets/ProblemSet2.qmd) |
| Problem Set 3 | Probability & distributions | [Prompt](PADM8410_Assignment3.qmd) |
| Problem Set 4 | Regression & model interpretation | [Prompt](Problem_Sets/ProblemSet4.qmd) |

## Midterm Exam (20%)

The take-home midterm is assigned during Week 7 and covers material from Weeks 1--7.

- [Midterm prompt](Midterm/PADM8410_Midterm.qmd)

## Data Op-Ed (15%)

Write a data-driven opinion piece on a policy topic of your choice.

- [Assignment details](Problem_Sets/OpEd Assignment.docx)

## Final Project (30%)

Details to be announced.

## Grading Scale

| Grade | Range |
|-------|-------|
| A     | 93--100 |
| A-    | 90--92.9 |
| B+    | 87--89.9 |
| B     | 83--86.9 |
| B-    | 80--82.9 |
| C+    | 77--79.9 |
| C     | 73--76.9 |
| C-    | 70--72.9 |
| F     | < 70 |
